title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Kid, Yasuie, Unknown person #8, Toko, Zoro as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Let's hear it, old maid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: go ahead and RANK your problems... FJ

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: DA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RA-RARARARA-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can start with No. 3 on the list!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Eustass kid has escaped.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WhaaaaAA AAAAAAT!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And No. 22?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The keys for the seasons handle were stolen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Whaaa AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA AAAAT!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Then what about no. 1?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy is trying to escape right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA AAA?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Go catch him, you dimwits!!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Ebisu Town town

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yo- YOOO 00!!F

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's fine, don't worry about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said that you are friends of young master Zorojuro, did you not!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Feel free to make use of this empty house, to your hearts' content!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Ahaha Haaaaaa!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because, see... my stomach's rumbling cause I'm hungry, so I'm gonna die soon any- ways!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why this is basically an empty house!! Aha hahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's so funny about that...?

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: All I can do is laugh, Ahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: but back to the matter at hand... you all were just a bit late.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZOROJURO BOLITED OUT OF TOWN ALL OF A SUDDEN TO GO SOME- WHERE ELSE!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He said his sword was stolen...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And he sure made a big fuss about it!! I don't know how far he's gone, or who he's chas- ing, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think it's very unlikely that he'll be able to find his way back here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where did black leg-ya go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Now that you mention it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't tell me he...!!?

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: THE FLOWER CAPITAL- BATH HOUSE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HAAAAH- I'm feeling less fatigued by the minute-:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But isn't this water a bit too hot?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The citizens prefer it that way.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't it risky for us to take a bath in public?...what will we do if something happens...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're quite the cautious one, aren't you, friend of the Ninja?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While it's true that we demOMC ARTS users cannot use our powers when submerged in water... it's fine for us to relax right now. Our enemies will not find us here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well, there aren't any enemies here, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: shouldn't we charge THEM for being here...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I CAN'T BELIEVE THIS WAS A UNISEX BATHOUSE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it really so strange for such a crowd to be in a bathhouse? I know that they're all here for me, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is nothing I can do about it. Young men are just...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: get out of the way, you old Hag!!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: Ninja Arts- Ball Buster!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: G'IAAAAA AAAAM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Shinobu!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It makes sense... he IS a YAKUZA boss, after all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Pammonote September

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What are you talking about, you fool!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Back in the day, the Yakuza were allies of the commoners!! Although, most youngsters don't know about those days...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that our bodies are warmed, we should have the male bathhouse attendants scrub our backs.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 53 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
